MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Paul f. Wartelle for plaintiff and moving party: Albert Patane
David Semel for defendant and opposing party: Yasin A. Salma

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Albert Patane's motion to compel answers to interrogatories is Denied.
Plaintiff previoulsy waived the right to compel further responses by not making a motion pursuant to CCP Section 2030.300 regarding the first set of special interrogatories. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS
Off Calendar Sep-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul f. Wartelle for plaintiff and moving party: Albert Patane
David Semel for defendant and opposing party: Yasin A. Salma

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Albert Patane's motion to compel further responses to requests for admissions is Granted.
The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to serve verified responses within 10 days of notice of this order. The request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
